displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Comes with Helioplex Broad Spectrum UVA/UVB sun protection with SPF 50
• Provides beach-strength sun protection and defends against signs of water damage
• Lightweight, fast absorbing, ideal for outdoor skin protection
• Oil-free and PABA free

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
1. Apply generously 15 minutes before sun exposure
2. Re-apply after 80 minutes of swimming or sweating / immediately after towel drying / at least every 2 hours

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Protect this product from excessive heat and direct sun

displayMetadata.name: INGREDIENTS
displayMetadata.value:
• Active Ingredients (Purpose - Sunscreen): Avobenzone (3%), Homosalate (10%), Octisalate (5%), Octocrylene (4.5%), Oxybenzone (4%)
• Inactive Ingredients: Water, Styrene/Acrylates Copolymer, Dimethicone, Potassium Cetyl Phosphate, Benzyl Alcohol, Silica, Diethylhexyl 2, 6-Naphthalate, Dimethicone/PEG-10/15 Crosspolymer, Trisiloxane, Cetyl Dimethicone, Beeswax, Ethylhexylglycerin, Sodium Polyacrylate, Xanthan Gum, Ethylhexyl Stearate, Acrylates/C12-22 Alkyl Methacrylate Copolymer, Behenyl Alcohol, Trideceth-6, Disodium EDTA, Glycerate Stearate, PEG-100 Stearate, Caprylyl Glycol, Chlorphenesin, Fragrance

metaData.Key Information: Garnier Super UV Anti-Acne Serum formulated to provide daily sun protection for acne-prone skin. Offering 12 hours of oil control and protection from harmful UV rays, it helps prevent acne and reduces sun damage. The water-resistant, non-comodogenic formula ensures no clogging of pores and is makeup-compatible for everyday use.

product.description: Helioplex SL Technology uses more efficient UV filters to form a protective film on the skin’s surface for advanced protection against UVB, deep UVA and visible light.

metaData.Key Information:
• A daily sunscreen that goes beyond UV protection.
• With Helioplex SL Technology for Broad Spectrum UVA-UVB protection.
• Tested by Dermatologist.
• Enriched with antioxidants, Vitamin C & E, Niacinamide and Hyaluronic Acid to reveal firmer, smoother and younger-looking skin^
• Water-light texture with invisible dry-touch finish.
• Leaves no white cast. Sweat resistant.
• Suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin.

^Tested on 120 women over 28 days in Brazil, 2023.
metaData.Preparation: Shake before use. Apply generously over skin 15 minutes before sun exposure. Reapply every 1-2 hours for optimal sun protection. Always reapply after excessive sweating, swimming, bathing, towel-drying or prolonged sun exposure.
metaData.SAP Product Name: NEUTROGENA ULTRA SHEER FLUID SUNSCREEN SPF 50 40ML
metaData.Storage Information: Store in cool and dry place
